column7:
No, we don't sell diamonds. 💎

Here's why we're called Diamond & Jeweler:

Every diamond starts as a rough stone. Unnoticed. Unpolished. Easy to walk past.

It only shines after it meets the jeweler — someone who sees its potential, cuts it, and places it in the right setting.

Talent works exactly the same way. You might feel overlooked right now. But you're not untalented — you just haven't met the right jeweler yet. The right leader. The right place where you finally shine.

Everyone is a diamond. You just need the right cut.

But a diamond never finds its jeweler by accident. That's where we come in.

Diamond & Jeweler is the place where hidden talents meet the leaders who bring out their shine. We don't sell diamonds — we make the meeting happen.

💎 diamondandjeweler.com

column5: Day 34 — "How to negotiate +RM800/mo in 5 moves" (FRAMEWORK REDESIGN)
column7:
Salary negotiation for fresh grads in Malaysia 🇲🇾

90% of fresh grads accept the first number offered. That's how RM800/month disappears for the next 12 months.

You don't lose the money in the offer. You lose it in the silence after.

5 moves that work, even if you've never negotiated:
1. Never name your number first
2. Let them anchor — then pause
3. Counter with VALUE, not feelings ("based on the scope, I was thinking…")
4. Negotiate the package — sign-on, bonus, leave
5. Get the final offer in writing

📌 Save this before your next offer call.

#DNJ #SalaryMalaysia #FreshGraduateMalaysia #KerjaKosong #GajiFreshGrad #CareerMalaysia #JobSearchMY #InterviewTipsMalaysia #EveryoneIsADiamond #MatchedByDNJ #DNJDiamonds

column7:
Hiring truth in Malaysia 2026 🇲🇾

CGPA can't measure hunger.

Your transcript is a photo. Not a film. It shows where you were — not where you're going.

The candidate with a 3.2 who taught herself Python on weekends is often more valuable than the 3.95 who memorized for the exam.

Prove it with one project. One metric. One specific story.

DNJ matches on POTENTIAL + PROOF. Not a number. 💎

📌 Save this if your GPA never reflected the real you.

column7:
Hiring biases in Malaysia 2026 🇲🇾

3 hiring truths no manager will admit out loud:

#1 Confidence > capability. The room rewards the loudest, not the most accurate.

#2 'Culture fit' rejections are usually bias in disguise. (You reminded them of someone.)

#3 'We'll let you know' is almost always a 'no'. The yes comes faster than the no.

The filter is broken. Not you.

DNJ matches on FIT + potential. Not who talks loudest. 💎
